button.invisible: stage_id == 4 or stage_id == 18 or stage_id == 19 or not stage_id

xpath.attribute: x_studio_ not in [uid] or stage_id not in [12]
x_studio_ not in [uid] or stage_id not in [10]
x_studio_ not in [uid] or stage_id not in [10]
x_studio_ not in [uid] or stage_id not in [10]
not set(users_in_lines).intersection([uid]) or stage_id not in [11]
not set(users_in_lines).intersection([uid]) or stage_id not in [11]
not set(users_in_lines).intersection([uid]) or stage_id not in [11]
